Join us TONIGHT for our 
February PTA General Meeting! 
Wednesday, February 11th
8:00-9:00 PM ET via Zoom
Click to join meeting
We look forward to seeing you there!

HELP ST. CLOUD WIN 100% OF
THE PROCEEDS AND ENJOY A
FUN KID-FREE NIGHT!

Check with your employer to see if your donation can
be matched. This is an easy way to double your
impact. Every bit helps our school and its students!
PTA TIN: 51-0224833

Join the St. Cloud Elementary School PTA to
organize a family STEM festival this spring for our
community. We are need volunteers to help:
-Logistics and outreach
-Inclusive, hands-on family STEM activities
-Donations and sponsorsVolunteers needed to help
bring our grant-funded
Family STEM Festival to life!
All are welcome to volunteer - teachers,
parents/ caregivers, community members, 
high school and college students
SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER BY COMPLETING
THIS FORM SCAN THIS
CODE 
Planning meetings for subcommittees will
begin in January and meet via Zoom.
Questions? Contact us at
grants@stcloudpta.org

JOIN NOW
